name: Cisco Umbrella
description: Cloud-delivered DNS security and web filtering platform. Monitor policies and admin access.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cisco Umbrella Dashboard
2. Go to Admin → API Keys
3. Create a new key with Admin scope
4. Copy API Key and Secret
5. Paste both below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: From Umbrella Dashboard → Admin → API Keys.

credentialFields.label: API Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Shown once when creating the API key.

checks.name: Cisco Umbrella App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Cisco Umbrella API is accessible.
